description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, green roof featuring multiple skylights. The structure is characterized by extensive use of glass walls, especially on the front and side facades, providing panoramic views and abundant natural light. The main living area appears to be elevated, with a visible swimming pool running along the front, partially enclosed by transparent glass panels. The exterior walls are primarily white, with some wooden accents visible on the deck and interior flooring. There is a staircase at one end, suggesting access to a lower level or basement. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing open spaces and integration with the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof, glass walls, and a front-facing swimming pool. The design is minimalist with white and wood accents and large skylights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green flat roof, glass-walled pool, and white exterior with a glimpse of the interior living space.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the green roof, skylights, and a staircase leading to a lower level.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the glass pool, white facade, and open deck area.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pool, lounge chairs, and extensive glass frontage beneath the green roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped glass panels on the front and sides
